en: For I want you to know how great a struggle I have for you and for those at Laodicea and for all who have not seen me face to face,
zh: 我願意你們知道，我為你們和在老底嘉的人，以及所有沒有跟我見過面的人，是怎樣竭力奮鬥，

en: that their hearts may be encouraged, being knit together in love, to reach all the riches of full assurance of understanding and the knowledge of God's mystery, which is Christ,
zh: 為的是要他們的心得著勉勵，在愛中彼此聯繫，可以得著憑悟性、因確信而來的一切豐盛，也可以充分認識 神的奧祕，這奧祕就是基督；

en: in whom are hidden all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.
zh: 一切智慧和知識的寶庫都蘊藏在基督裡面。

en: I say this in order that no one may delude you with plausible arguments.
zh: 我說這些話，免得有人用花言巧語欺騙你們。

en: For though I am absent in body, yet I am with you in spirit, rejoicing to see your good order and the firmness of your faith in Christ.
zh: 我雖然不在你們那裡，心卻與你們同在。我看見你們循規蹈矩，並且對基督有堅定的信心，就歡喜了。

en: Therefore, as you received Christ Jesus the Lord, so walk in him,
zh: 你們怎樣接受了基督耶穌為主，就當照樣在他裡面行事為人，

en: rooted and built up in him and established in the faith, just as you were taught, abounding in thanksgiving.
zh: 按著你們所領受的教導，在他裡面扎根、建造，信心堅定，滿有感謝的心。

en: See to it that no one takes you captive by philosophy and empty deceit, according to human tradition, according to the elemental spirits of the world, and not according to Christ.
zh: 你們要謹慎，免得有人不照著基督，而照著人的傳統，和世俗的言論，藉著哲學和騙人的空談，把你們擄去。

en: For in him the whole fullness of deity dwells bodily,
zh: 因為 神本性的一切豐盛，都有形有體地住在基督裡面，

en: and you have been filled in him, who is the head of all rule and authority.
zh: 你們也是在他裡面得了豐盛。他是一切執政掌權者的元首。

en: In him also you were circumcised with a circumcision made without hands, by putting off the body of the flesh, by the circumcision of Christ,
zh: 你們也在他裡面受了不是由人手所行的割禮，而是受了基督的割禮，就是除掉你們的罪身。

en: having been buried with him in baptism, in which you were also raised with him through faith in the powerful working of God, who raised him from the dead.
zh: 你們在洗禮中已經與他一同埋葬，也在洗禮中，因信那使基督從死人中復活的 神所運行的動力，與他一同復活了。

en: And you, who were dead in your trespasses and the uncircumcision of your flesh, God made alive together with him, having forgiven us all our trespasses,
zh: 你們因著過犯和肉體未受割禮，原是死的，然而 神赦免了我們的一切過犯，使你們與基督一同活過來，

en: by canceling the record of debt that stood against us with its legal demands. This he set aside, nailing it to the cross.
zh: 塗抹了那寫在規條上反對我們、與我們為敵的字句，並且把這字句從我們中間拿去，釘在十字架上。

en: He disarmed the rulers and authorities and put them to open shame, by triumphing over them in him.
zh: 他既然靠著十字架勝過了一切執政掌權的，廢除了他們的權勢，就在凱旋的行列中，把他們公開示眾。

en: Therefore let no one pass judgment on you in questions of food and drink, or with regard to a festival or a new moon or a Sabbath.
zh: 所以不要讓人因著飲食、節期、月朔、安息日批評你們，

en: These are a shadow of the things to come, but the substance belongs to Christ.
zh: 這些不過是將來的事的影子，那真體卻是屬於基督的。

en: Let no one disqualify you, insisting on asceticism and worship of angels, going on in detail about visions, puffed up without reason by his sensuous mind,
zh: 不要讓人奪去你們的獎賞，他們以故意謙卑，敬拜天使為樂；迷於自己所見過的；憑著肉體的意念，無故地自高自大；

en: and not holding fast to the Head, from whom the whole body, nourished and knit together through its joints and ligaments, grows with a growth that is from God.
zh: 不與頭緊密相連。其實全身都是藉著關節和筋絡從頭得著供應和聯繫，就照著 神所要求的，生長起來。

en: If with Christ you died to the elemental spirits of the world, why, as if you were still alive in the world, do you submit to regulations-
zh: 你們若與基督一同死了，脫離了世俗的言論，為甚麼仍然好像活在世俗中一樣，拘守那“不可摸、不可嘗、不可觸”的規條呢？

en: "Do not handle, Do not taste, Do not touch"
(referring to things that all perish as they are used)- according to human precepts and teachings?
zh: 這些規條是照著人的命令和教訓而定的，

en: These have indeed an appearance of wisdom in promoting self-made religion and asceticism and severity to the body, but they are of no value in stopping the indulgence of the flesh.
zh: 在隨著己意敬拜，故作謙卑，和苦待己身等事上，似乎是智慧之言，其實只能叫人放縱肉體，再沒有任何價值。
